retroactive_reason: Orchestrator landed W13A commits without manifests after OOM cut the W13A agent mid-sweep. This manifest reconstructs status from commit log (35d9c921, 5c356f6b) and Wave-13 backlog scope.
findings_assigned: C1 prev #2 deeper carve of _ensembling_score.py (EnsembleScoreState dataclass)

C1_6_rfecv_outer_loop_carve.notes: Outer while-loop body extracted to sibling via OuterLoopState dataclass. _rfecv_fit.py 536 -> 315 LOC (target <400 MET). New sibling _rfecv_fit_outer_loop.py (341 LOC) holds OuterLoopState with ~12 mutable locals + 6 break conditions. Parent fit() shrinks to dispatching through state setup/init/loop/finalize. Behavioural-equivalence sensor was deferred by OOM; orchestrator confirmed via post-commit RFECV biz_value suite that fit-path behaviour stable.

C1_prev_2_ensembling_score_carve.reason: OOM cut agent before EnsembleScoreState dataclass refactor; remains at 709 LOC (W12A intermediate). Requires streaming vs materialised dispatcher refactor as foundation. Tracked for next dedicated wave.

phase_train_one_target_body_carve.reason: OOM cut agent before CodeStateBundle dataclass design. 933 LOC single-function monolith requires structured state extraction. Tracked for next dedicated wave.

main_train_suite_carve.reason: OOM cut agent before CodeStateBundle dataclass design. 921 LOC single-function monolith. Tracked alongside _phase_train_one_target_body (shared CodeStateBundle design).

phase_recurrent_silent_drop_diagnostic.notes: Surfaced during W13A audit of recurrent ensemble member-drop patterns. Pre-fix: _safe_predict_recurrent returned None silently on either empty array OR any non-finite entry (silent correctness bug class per feedback_silent_correctness_bug_classes). Now: distinct WARN for each case carrying shape/length/n_nan + likely-causes hint (too-few epochs, NaN gradients, feature_scaler column mismatch). Sensor coverage was OOM-deferred; tracked as W14 follow-up if needed.
